projectDescription: A comprehensive OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) tool that aggregates multiple free APIs into a unified interface for username searches, reverse image lookups, email verification, domain analysis, and company research.
keyFeatures: Username enumeration across multiple platforms using WhatsMyName, Sherlock, and Maigret
Reverse image search via Google Lens, Yandex, and Bing with EXIF metadata extraction
Email verification and breach history lookup using IPQualityScore
Comprehensive domain analysis including DNS records, WHOIS, SSL certificates, and technology detection
Company research across UK Companies House, SEC EDGAR, and GLEIF databases
Privacy-focused design with no user accounts, tracking, or permanent data storage
publicApiSurface: POST /api/username/search - Search for username across social platforms
POST /api/image/upload - Upload image for reverse search
POST /api/image/analyze - Analyze image with reverse search engines
POST /api/email/verify - Verify email and check breach history
POST /api/domain/analyze - Analyze domain security and infrastructure
